subject: Generating initial reconstruction after exporting particles
body:
Hi,

I might be missing something obvious, but I don't see a way of generating
an initial average from my particles STAR file when exporting particles
from WarpTools using --2d. If using --3d, we can use relion_reconstruct_mpi
as before in Windows Warp. Is that the only way?

Thanks in advance!

--
Ricardo Diogo Righetto
